feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: unable to Create multiple templates with different language in form service by adobe.
entry.content:
My requirement is to create a form which will be sent to vendors in there respective language.

followed below steps:-

1. open Sap form services by adobe overview.

2. In template store created a form and added a template in germen lang.

3. now i am trying to add same template with same template name but with different lang, error is getting encountered. 

Now i looked over the sap help document and there it is written.

https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-cf/manage-forms-templates-and-schemas-ui

So my question, is it possible to have a single template with same name with different language assigned. if not how do i achieve my requirement. 

Also below highlighted point was not visible in the UI of optional data.

 

 

 

additional information, these forms are going to be utilized in SAP Build process automation .

entry.title: Unable to register SAP Desktop Agent 3
entry.content:
Installed Desktop Agent 3 but unable to Activate it.  I followed the steps in https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-setup-desktop-3-0-agent.html

Step 4 Register the Desktop Agent on your tenant - tried both Automatic and Manual options but nothing worked. As stated in Step 4 Point 5 - Confirm the tenant configuration. I tried to Activate it. It's opening the browser popup to authenticate and showing it as Login Successful but it's not activating it.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Issue with Action Field Mapping
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am encountering an issue when mapping a body field with the type "object" in an Action to a Process in SAP Build Process Automation. Fields with the type "object" do not appear in the input of the Action. Is this a limitation, or are there alternative solutions? From what I understand, the "object" type in SAP Build Process is treated as type ANY when processed using Custom Script. However, instead of showing the input as type ANY, the Action hides it entirely.

Image action body field

Image Action mapping in Process (Only fields type sting available)

Thank a lot.

entry.title: Unable to install Desktop Agent 3 in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am doing the tutorial Install and setup Desktop Agent 3 -  https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-setup-desktop-3-0-agent.html.

In Step 2, point 1, when I go to the Control Tower tab and select the option Agent Update, I see that its blank as shown in the below screen. I don't see, "Enter Secret ID to configure agent update". I am an S user and hence chose the option Automatically.  Can you please help in fixing this issue.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Generate an ID number in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I am creating a process automation form in SAP Build Process Automation. I am trying to configure the form to generate an auto-generated sequential ID number and send it by email to the approver.

I used the script option, but it does not seem to be working.

Do you have any guidelines on how to achieve this?

entry.title: How to set up Manage Sales Order ( Live Process Project ) in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
We are in the process of implementing the Manage Sales Order (Live Process Project) in SAP Build Process Automation, but we have a few queries regarding the configuration setup:

 


1. In the attached screenshot, we can see that the functionality is typically achieved using Workflow Management. However, the documentation mentions that this functionality can be achieved either by Workflow Management or Build Process Automation. Could you please provide the process flow steps for achieving this functionality using Build Process Automation?

 

2. In the Functionality Diagram, Event Mesh is part of Workflow. Since we are following Build Process Automation, do we need to set up Event Mesh, or is it already available within Build Process Automation? If it's available, where can we check this functionality? If it's not available, could you guide us on how and where to set it up?

 

3. For configuring Cloud Integration, please provide the Configuration Setup Guide and explain how it works in the context of SAP Build Process Automation.

 

4. Is it mandatory to configure an Email Destination in SAP BTP, or is it already preconfigured in the Build Process Automation project?

 

5. Is it mandatory to configure Workflow Destinations in SAP BTP for SAP Build Process Automation, or is this not required since we are only using Build Process Automation and not Workflow?

 

6. Is Process Visibility Service required in Build Process Automation? If so, how can we set it up, as the service is not available in BTP? 

 

7. Is configuring a Business Rules Destination required in Build Process Automation? If yes, could you please clarify the URL that needs to be provided? The Setup Guide mentions the URL part but doesn’t provide full details, so we would appreciate it if you could provide the complete URL format. 

 

could you please guide us on how to set up the necessary configurations .

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Event Mesh SAP Cloud for Customer integration with SAP S/4HANA  SAP Business Workflow SAP Workflow Management SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability 

Thanks & Regards,
Vijay Kumar.

entry.title: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP Destination API
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing strange error while calling SAP Build process automation from SAP Build apps using SAP Build apps published library API integration in which i have published my build process automation API trigger.

Performed all steps correctly in steps provided in "https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/sap-build-process-automation?q=service+key".

When i debugged the issue i found the error as below

"{
"status": 401,
"statusText": "Unauthorized",
"headers": {
"cache-control": "no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate",
"expires": "0",
"pragma": "no-cache",
"referrer-policy": "no-referrer",
"www-authenticate": "Bearer error=\"invalid_token\", error_description=\"Jwt token with allowed audiences [destination-xsappname!b62, uaa, openid, xs_account, sb-clone850d95a770d2421f962aa985e61e9bda!b107153|destination-xsappname!b62] matches none of these: [xsuaa!b120249]\", error_uri=\"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6750#section-3.1\"",
"x-content-type-options": "nosniff",
"x-frame-options": "DENY",
"x-vcap-request-id": "70a2438e-ac45-4a98-4696-cf9c0fa58649",
"x-xss-protection": "0",
"date": "Sun, 12 Jan 2025 09:18:37 GMT",
"strict-transport-security": "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload;",
"connection": "close"
},
"responseText": ""
}

Any help will be appreciated.

entry.title: Issues Completing Tutorials with SAP Build Work Zone on Trial Account
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working through the following tutorials:

  • SAP Build Work Zone - Add a Workspace
  • Access SAP Build Apps via SAP Work Zone
  • Work Zone Workshop - Access

However, I am using a trial account and cannot access certain features required for these tutorials. For example:

  • In the SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition, I cannot access the "Manage Workspaces and Workpages" section, which seems to be exclusive to the Advanced Edition.
  • I also noticed that the prerequisites for some tutorials mention receiving a specific URL, username, and password for the training account, which I did not receive.

My main question is:

  • How can I complete these tutorials on a trial account, or is there a way to request temporary access to the Advanced Edition for training purposes?
  • Alternatively, can I contact the tutorial instructor or support team to gain the necessary credentials or guidance?

I appreciate any advice or assistance you can provide to help me resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Luigi Funaro

entry.title: Condition using a String function
entry.content:
Greetings experts, I am trying to use the endsWith function in as a condition, but I keeping getting an error that says 'type not found for variable "endsWith" '. I have included the Core SDK to use the function.

What I am trying to do is that I am evaluating attachments in Outlook (using the Outlook SDK), and all the attachments that end with .pdf are the attachments that I want to process? But I cannot get the endsWith function to work and I cannot find any documentation that shows an example of this.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Unable to launch SAPUI5 Task while opening in SAP BTP Workzone My Inbox app.
entry.content:
i,

I've followed all the steps as mentioned in the tutorial as well as pre-requisite tutorials in my BTP trial account (Integrate UI5 task  - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-integrate-sapui5-task-process.html    )

However, the My Inbox app is not opening the task, although I can see number of tasks on the tile in the workzone site launchpad. refer screenshots 1 and 2.

Also the Process trigger (local copy) app is not loaded which created using the custom SAP UI5 task (workflow UI MTA module) for SBPA approval Process as per the tutorial (Run process from site - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-business-process-business-site.html ). Refer screenshot 3.

error screenshots given below -

1. MyInbox app shows number of Tasks 

2. Error on opening My Inbox app -

3. Error on load in Process trigger App local copy -

Thanks,

Varad

entry.title: Unable to find my deployed Processes and triggers in the manage section
entry.content:
Hi 
I am unable to find my deployed processes and triggers in the manage section of the SAP build lobby. I am currently referring to the Step 3 (Run Business process) of the mission in SAP Build apps. Kindly help me with the same. Attaching the screenshot here from the tutorial as well as my own screen.

This is my screen.

This is the tutorial screen.

Kindly help me with this issue. earlier response to this will be highly appreciated.
Thanks

entry.title: Returning a List of Document Templates (using Document Information Extraction)
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I am working on automation, I would like to know how to pass a list of Document Templates to the Extract Data (Template) artifact? Because I want to set up a dynamic way in the event that new Document Templates are added.

Please see below for a screenshot of how I am currently using the Extract Data artifact.

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Destination not accessible in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am creation one Automation in SAP BPA.

i have created destination in BTP cockpit as bellow

then i have create Action project in SAP Build, Connectors. where i am able to test services and getting response with 200 status.

when trying to access this action from automation, i am getting "Unauthorized" error

Error Details:

{
"uid": "df13630b-ad7d-4fce-83a8-7c425b811908",
"name": "Get entities from StorageFacility_UnitDetails",
"type": "automation",
"instanceUid": "47e5a3ab-6507-4e70-8638-7ef157f82c1b",
"packageUid": "4c5bc1a4-5cde-4a6c-9ed7-a79c7aac7844",
"packageVersionUid": "168e29f3-b04c-460c-a9d5-d23cae68f7de",
"attended": true,
"duration": 2,
"status": "Failed",
"code": "KO",
"label": "Action execution resulted in 401 with response {"error":{"code":"401","message":"Unauthorized"}}",
"parentInstanceUid": "aaaa1b90-174d-6ed7-97f6-2c542bd0ef56",
"containerInstanceUid": "47e5a3ab-6507-4e70-8638-7ef157f82c1b",
"line": 8,
"file": "temp_ah.js",
"stepId": "4",
"exception": "irpa_core.error.ActionRestExecutionError",
"errorParameters": {
"statusCode": 401,
"response": {
"error": {
"code": "401",
"message": "Unauthorized"
}
}
},
"stack": "Error: Action execution resulted in 401 with response {"error":{"code":"401","message":"Unauthorized"}} at Object._doExecuteAction (C:\Users\arH\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\a0c39ed6-530a-4151-b2e0-9c9e668e8233\dist\bundle.js:2:112609) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5) at async Object.executeAction (C:\Users\arH\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\a0c39ed6-530a-4151-b2e0-9c9e668e8233\dist\bundle.js:2:111642) at async t.Job.47e5a3ab-6507-4e70-8638-7ef157f82c1b (C:\Users\arH\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\168e29f3-b04c-460c-a9d5-d23cae68f7de\automations\temp_ah.js:8:20) at async t.Job.start (C:\Users\arH\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\a0c39ed6-530a-4151-b2e0-9c9e668e8233\dist\bundle.js:2:313843) at async u.core.startJob (C:\Users\arH\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\a0c39ed6-530a-4151-b2e0-9c9e668e8233\dist\bundle.js:2:306950)"
}

 

Please help to find out the correct solution for this.

Best Regards,

Arti

entry.title: Extracting Line Items from the a Document Template
entry.content:
Happy Monday Experts. I am working on an automation that will auto-approve invoices using a document template. I have create a 'skeleton' so to say. My current setup extracts fields at a Header field. But I need assistance with extracting field at a line item level. Basically I need a clarity on the approach, because various invoices have varying numbers of line items.

Therefore, I would to know if I show create line for the empty fields, that way it would return details should that space been populate and return blank if the fields are empty.

SAP Business Technology Platform #SAP Build Process Automation SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: List Creation, Population and Retrieval
entry.content:
Dear Maestros, I have created a List variable, but I am only able to Set Variable Value for the 0th element and only retrieve the 0th element, because my 'Set Variable Value' method only allows input of myVariable[0]. I would like to ask what I may be doing incorrect? 

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: BTP Trial version, Open Excel Instance of irpa_Excel is diabled
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using BTP trail version to try SAP tutorials for build automation,  I am trying to use Open excel instance from IRPA_EXCEL application, but it is disabled and i am not able to drag this on to canvas.

 

I am using a m2 macbook, the issue happens with Client development environment too.

Can anyone let me know how to enable IRPA_EXCEL for excel automation?

excel

entry.title: Is there an option to Search emails from shared mailbox in Microsoft Outlook 365 Online SDK?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to Search emails from a shared mailbox using Outlook 365 Web SDK in SAP Build Process Automation, but I cannot see any option to do that? I see that send email activity does have an option to send email 'On behalf of' but cannot find any such option for Search Email and Get email information. Your expert guidance on the matter is highly appreciated.

Thanks

Karun

SAP Build SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to transform table extracts from S/4HANA to a usable event log doc for Signavio purposes pls?
entry.content:
I am trying to analyse the P2P process and have extracted the relevant tables from S/4HANA system as csv files. Now I need to manually upload those tables into Signavio, but I understand those need to be in an event log format. Any guidance on how I can achieve this data transformation please?

Thank you!

entry.title: [URGENT] All My Inbox apps in SAP BTP Build Work Zone are Crashing in 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

All your Build workzone My Inbox apps are crashing in Build workzone, please help.

entry.title: How can I get data from custom business object of s4hana cloud from SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to get Approver email of SAP Build Process Automation workflow from custom business object data of S4hana cloud.

The steps I would like to do are,

1. Create custom business object of Approver list by using key-user (in-app) extensibility.

2. Create BPA workflow 

3. Call Approver list of custom business object from BPA workflow

 

Could you please give me advice how can I get data from custom business object from BPA workflow?

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan
